login.heading: Welcome back
login.subheading: Sign in to your Colab account.
login.error_account_locked: Your account has been temporarily locked. Try again in {minutes, plural, one{# minute} other{# minutes}}.
login.error_account_suspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact support.
login.error_generic: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

signup.heading: Create account
signup.subheading: Join Colab — the platform for creative artists.
signup.age_attestation_label: I confirm I am 18 years of age or older
signup.tos_label: I agree to the Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and Community Guidelines
signup.error_age_required: You must be 18 or older to use Colab.
signup.error_tos_required: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
signup.error_password_weak: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signup.error_phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number in E.164 format (+12125551234).
signup.error_email_exists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.

forgot_password.heading: Reset password
forgot_password.subheading: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot_password.success_body: We sent a password reset link to {email}. It expires in 15 minutes.
forgot_password.error_email_not_found: No account found with that email.
forgot_password.error_generic: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.

verify_email.heading: Verify your email
verify_email.body: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below.
verify_email.error_code_invalid: Invalid or expired code. Please request a new one.

welcome.heading: Welcome to Colab
welcome.subheading: The creative collaboration platform for artists.
welcome.age_notice: 18+ only · US, CA, AU, NZ, IN

sign_out_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
